# opnsense_kea_dhcpv6_reservation (Resource)

Manages a Kea DHCPv6 host reservation on OPNsense, pinning an IPv6 address to a client DUID within a subnet.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `duid` (String) Client DUID the reservation matches.
- `ip_address` (String) Reserved IPv6 address (must fall within the subnet).
- `subnet_id` (String) UUID of the Kea DHCPv6 subnet this reservation belongs to.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the reservation.
- `domain_search` (Set of String) Domain search list handed to the client.
- `hostname` (String) Hostname assigned to the client.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the reservation.
